academy_notebook.name: Academy Notebook
academy_notebook.description: A worn leather-bound notebook filled with scribbled lectures.

chalk_piece.name: Chalk Piece
chalk_piece.description: White chalk used for temporary markings.

goblin_ear.name: Goblin Ear
goblin_ear.description: A sharp, pointed green ear, cut from a defeated goblin.

healing_herb.name: Healing Herb
healing_herb.description: A small bundle of dried herbs with a faint medicinal scent.

kobold_remains.name: Kobold Remains
kobold_remains.description: Evidence of a defeated Kobold, requested by the Old Wizard.

lost_notebook.name: Scholar's Lost Notebook
lost_notebook.description: A leather-bound notebook lost in the fields.

old_coin.name: Old Coin
old_coin.description: A tarnished coin from a forgotten era. Worth a few copper to a collector.

slime_remains.name: Slime Remains
slime_remains.description: A gelatinous blob left behind by a defeated slime. Still faintly warm.

travel_ration.name: Travel Ration
travel_ration.description: Dried meat and hardtack. Keeps you going.

rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: A discarded iron sword, pitting with rust. Still sharp enough to cut.

stone_hammer.name: Stone Hammer
stone_hammer.description: A simple stone mallet lashed to a wooden shaft. Heavy and sturdy.

training_bow.name: Training Bow
training_bow.description: A flexible wooden bow used for target practice.

novice_staff.name: Novice Staff
novice_staff.description: A polished wooden staff carved with focusing runes.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.description: A round wooden buckler painted with protective symbols.

ragged_cap.name: Ragged Cap
ragged_cap.description: A simple cloth hat that offers minor protection from elements.

leather_tunic.name: Leather Tunic
leather_tunic.description: A sturdy shirt made of cured animal hide.

worn_gloves.name: Worn Gloves
worn_gloves.description: Scuffed leather gloves protecting your hands.

worn_boots.name: Worn Boots
worn_boots.description: Muddied leather boots suitable for traveling.

copper_ring.name: Copper Ring
copper_ring.description: A simple metal band that feels slightly warm to the touch.
